depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the ndi.element whose contrast sensitivity is described.

depends_on.name: stimulus_presentation_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_presentation that drove the responses.

depends_on.name: stimulus_response_scalar_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_response_scalar from which sensitivity was computed.

fields.name: input_parameters
fields.documentation: Input parameters passed to the contrast-sensitivity calculator.

fields.name: spatial_frequencies
fields.documentation: Spatial frequencies (cycles per degree) at which contrast sensitivity is reported. One element per per-frequency value below.

fields.name: sensitivity_rb
fields.documentation: Per-frequency contrast sensitivity derived from a Naka-Rushton RB fit at that frequency.

fields.name: sensitivity_rbn
fields.documentation: Per-frequency contrast sensitivity derived from a Naka-Rushton RBN fit at that frequency.

fields.name: sensitivity_rbns
fields.documentation: Per-frequency contrast sensitivity derived from a Naka-Rushton RBNS fit at that frequency.

fields.name: relative_max_gain_rb
fields.documentation: Per-frequency relative maximum gain from the RB fit.

fields.name: relative_max_gain_rbn
fields.documentation: Per-frequency relative maximum gain from the RBN fit.

fields.name: relative_max_gain_rbns
fields.documentation: Per-frequency relative maximum gain from the RBNS fit.

fields.name: empirical_c50_rb
fields.documentation: Per-frequency empirical c50 from the RB fit.

fields.name: empirical_c50_rbn
fields.documentation: Per-frequency empirical c50 from the RBN fit.

fields.name: empirical_c50_rbns
fields.documentation: Per-frequency empirical c50 from the RBNS fit.

fields.name: saturation_index_rb
fields.documentation: Per-frequency saturation index from the RB fit.

fields.name: saturation_index_rbn
fields.documentation: Per-frequency saturation index from the RBN fit.

fields.name: saturation_index_rbns
fields.documentation: Per-frequency saturation index from the RBNS fit.

fields.name: parameters_rb
fields.documentation: Per-frequency fitted parameters from the RB model (one parameter set per frequency).

fields.name: parameters_rbn
fields.documentation: Per-frequency fitted parameters from the RBN model.

fields.name: parameters_rbns
fields.documentation: Per-frequency fitted parameters from the RBNS model.

fields.name: fitless_interpolated_c50
fields.documentation: Per-frequency interpolated c50 derived from the empirical curve (no model fit).

fields.name: is_modulated_response
fields.documentation: Boolean flag (0/1) indicating whether responses were treated as modulated (F1) rather than mean (F0). Stored as double for v1 compatibility.

fields.name: visual_response_p_bonferroni
fields.documentation: Per-frequency Bonferroni-corrected p-values for the visual-response ANOVA.

fields.name: response_varies_p_bonferroni
fields.documentation: Per-frequency Bonferroni-corrected p-values for the response-varies-across-contrasts ANOVA.

fields.name: response_type
fields.documentation: Reduction applied per trial to produce each response value.
